title: Capstone Projects
objective: Ship one real, end-to-end portfolio project using everything from modules 01–09.
topics: OpenAI RAG app — a RAG-backed Q&A tool over a real document set, with retrieval, generation, and an eval harness
Gemini multimodal app — an app that combines text + image/audio input using Gemini's multimodal capabilities
Claude agent workflow — a tool-using, multi-step agent workflow built on Claude, with tracing and a security review
project: Pick one (or do all three over time). Each should include: a README, an eval/test set, basic cost/latency notes, and a short security review borrowing the module-08 checklist.
